description_long: This is a compact, freestanding nightstand or side cabinet with a rectangular shape and a sturdy build. The top and base are made of dark wood, while the main body is a lighter, painted wood or laminate, creating a two-tone appearance. The front features a single, wide drawer with a decorative gold handle and an open shelf space above it, suitable for storing small items. The sides and back are plain, with no additional features or openings, emphasizing its functional, minimalist design. The drawer handle is ornate and metallic, contrasting with the otherwise simple lines of the cabinet. The overall construction suggests it is designed for indoor use, such as in bedrooms, living rooms, or offices.
description: A two-tone wooden nightstand or side cabinet with a single drawer, gold handle, and open shelf, featuring a dark top and base with light-colored sides.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open shelf, single drawer with a gold handle, and the two-tone color scheme.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain, light-colored panel and the dark wood top and base.
description_view_2: Back view revealing a flat, featureless light panel framed by the dark wood top and base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with plain light panel and dark wood accents.
